title: serve kore-website.css as static file for korczewski brand
description:
## Summary
- `kore-website.css` was loaded via `<style is:global>@import '../styles/kore-website.css';</style>` inside a JSX `{…}` conditional in `index.astro`
- Astro skips its CSS pipeline for `<style>` tags inside template expressions — the browser received a literal `@import` URL that 404'd, so the Kore layout had no styling
- Fix: move `kore-website.css` to `public/brand/korczewski/` (served as static file) and load it via a `<link>` in `Layout.astro`, matching the existing `colors_and_type.css` pattern

## Test plan
- [x] Verified `https://web.korczewski.de/brand/korczewski/kore-website.css` returns HTTP 200
- [x] Deployed to korczewski and smoke-checked `/404` (no redirect loop)
- [ ] Visually verify `web.korczewski.de` Kore homepage renders with correct styling

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
